seoTitle: Pretty Pine vs Primrose Valley — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Pretty Pine and Primrose Valley. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Pretty Pine vs Primrose Valley: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Pretty Pine and Primrose Valley.
heading: Pretty Pine vs Primrose Valley — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pretty Pine, New South Wales and Primrose Valley, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pretty Pine has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Primrose Valley (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pretty Pine or Primrose Valley safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pretty Pine has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Primrose Valley scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pretty Pine scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Primrose Valley scores 43/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pretty Pine or Primrose Valley?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pretty Pine has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
